label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 2

extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper won the Burgos sprint by choosing the left barrier line while Jakobsen went right after both lost organized leadouts in the chaotic finale
tactical_patterns: Astana went too early for Aramburu at intermediate sprint, allowing opportunist Jakobsen to mug them from behind.
Peloton rode almost as wide as long approaching Burgos, causing late crashes outside 3km and eliminating Bora's sprint chances.
TRENTIN Mattia led out MILANO for UAE successfully, but left/right barrier gaps became only passing routes in final meters.

rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: positive: opportunistically took intermediate sprint when Astana overcooked leadout timing, but lost his own train in finale and chose wrong barrier side
rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: positive: decisive judgment picking left barrier over right when leadout collapsed, won green jersey
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: third place without visible leadout shows raw positioning skill in chaotic sprint
rider_signals.ARAMBURU Alex: negative: Astana's premature intermediate sprint leadout work failed to deliver points despite teamwork
rider_signals.PROCUREUR Jordi: negative: Deceuninck leadout infrastructure boxed in and failed Jakobsen despite radio communications
rider_signals.TRENTIN Mattia: positive: UAE's clearest leadout vision in chaotic finale, successfully piloted Milano into contention
